sections.title: Would Have — Introduction and Formula
sections.explanation: Would Have is an essential building block of spoken and written English. Formula: Subject + would have + past participle (imagined/hypothetical past result). Rules: 'Would have' expresses what would have happened under a different (hypothetical) condition | Often paired with 'If' (third conditional): If I had known, I would have come | Formula: would have + V3 (past participle) | Negative: would not have + V3
sections.formula: Subject + would have + past participle (imagined/hypothetical past result)

examples.hindi: अगर मुझे पता होता, तो मैं आता।
examples.english: If I had known, I would have come.

examples.hindi: अगर उसने मेहनत की होती, तो वह पास हो जाता।
examples.english: If he had worked hard, he would have passed.

examples.hindi: अगर मेरे पास पैसे होते, तो मैं यह खरीदता।
examples.english: If I had money, I would have bought this.

examples.hindi: अगर तुम मुझे बताते, तो मैं मदद करता।
examples.english: If you had told me, I would have helped.

examples.hindi: अगर वह जल्दी आती, तो हम मिल पाते।
examples.english: If she had come early, we would have met.

examples.hindi: अगर हमें समय मिलता, तो हम जीत जाते।
examples.english: If we had time, we would have won.

sections.title: Would Have — Daily Life Usage
sections.explanation: Everyday sentences using Would Have for daily conversation.
sections.formula: Subject + would have + past participle (imagined/hypothetical past result)

examples.hindi: अगर मैं वहाँ होता, तो मैं यह देखता।
examples.english: If I had been there, I would have seen this.

examples.hindi: अगर उन्होंने ध्यान दिया होता, तो वे समझ जाते।
examples.english: If they had paid attention, they would have understood.

examples.hindi: अगर मुझे मौका मिलता, तो मैं यह करता।
examples.english: If I had gotten a chance, I would have done this.

examples.hindi: अगर तुम सुनते, तो तुम सीख जाते।
examples.english: If you had listened, you would have learned.

examples.hindi: अगर वह सच बताता, तो हम खुश होते।
examples.english: If he had told the truth, we would have been happy.

examples.hindi: अगर हम जल्दी निकलते, तो हम समय पर पहुँच जाते।
examples.english: If we had left early, we would have arrived on time.

sections.title: Would Have — Office & Professional Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Would Have — ऑफिस और पेशेवर उपयोग
sections.explanation: Practice Would Have in professional and office contexts.
sections.formula: Subject + would have + past participle (imagined/hypothetical past result)

examples.hindi: अगर मुझे यह पता होता, तो मैं ना करता।
examples.english: If I had known this, I would not have done it.

examples.hindi: अगर वह मुझसे पूछती, तो मैं बताता।
examples.english: If she had asked me, I would have told her.

examples.hindi: अगर तुमने कोशिश की होती, तो तुम सफल होते।
examples.english: If you had tried, you would have succeeded.

examples.hindi: अगर हमारे पास ज्यादा समय होता, तो हम और सीखते।
examples.english: If we had more time, we would have learned more.

sections.title: Would Have — Negative and Question Forms
sections.hindiTitle: Would Have — नकारात्मक और प्रश्न रूप
sections.explanation: How to make negative sentences and questions using Would Have. Common mistakes: wrong verb form after the modal, or missing "have" in perfect modals.
sections.formula: Subject + would have + past participle (imagined/hypothetical past result)

examples.hindi: अगर मैं जागता, तो मैं देख लेता।
examples.english: If I had woken up, I would have seen it.

examples.hindi: अगर उसने पहले फोन किया होता, तो हम मिल जाते।
examples.english: If he had called earlier, we would have met.

examples.hindi: अगर वे तैयार होते, तो वे जीत जाते।
examples.english: If they had been ready, they would have won.

examples.hindi: अगर तुम मुझे रोकते, तो मैं ना जाता।
examples.english: If you had stopped me, I would not have gone.
